## Test plan

* [ ] `bash -n ./bin/app-dual ./lib/*.sh`
* [ ] `bash ./tests/run.sh`
* [ ] Other manual checks, if applicable:

## Checklist

* [ ] The change is focused and ready for review.
* [ ] I have not committed secrets, local-only app paths, logs, temporary files, generated private data, or private assets.
* [ ] Logs, screenshots, paths, and examples are redacted where needed.
* [ ] Documentation or examples were updated, or no documentation update is needed.
* [ ] Release tags and publishing steps are left to maintainers.
